segments.text: AutoZone on Fifth Street, this is Jen.

segments.text: Hey Jen, do you guys have a starter in stock for a 2015 Hyundai Sonata 2.4?
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Let me look that up. 2015 Sonata 2.4 liter?
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: I've got two options. Duralast for $189.99 and a remanufactured one for $129.99.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: I'll take the Duralast. Can you hold it for me? I'll be there in about 20 minutes.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Got it, it'll be at the counter. See you soon.
segments.speaker: remote party

transcription.text: AutoZone on Fifth Street, this is Jen. Hey Jen, do you guys have a starter in stock for a 2015 Hyundai Sonata 2.4? Let me look that up. 2015 Sonata 2.4 liter? Yeah. I've got two options. Duralast for $189.99 and a remanufactured one for $129.99. I'll take the Duralast. Can you hold it for me? I'll be there in about 20 minutes. Sure thing. Name? [NAME]. Got it, it'll be at the counter. See you soon. Thanks Jen.
transcription.summary:
## Call Summary

Customer called AutoZone looking for a starter for a 2015 Hyundai Sonata 2.4L. Chose Duralast at $189.99. Part held at counter for pickup in 20 minutes.

**Action Items:**
- Hold Duralast starter at counter.
